name: Philly Cheese Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the broiler.
2. Heat oil in a large, heavy nonstick skillet over high heat.
3. Add meat; sauté 1½ minutes per side. Remove from pan and transfer to cutting board.
4. Slice meat across grain at an angle. Transfer to plate; cover and keep warm.
5. Add onion, salt, and pepper to the skillet. Reduce heat to medium; sauté until onion is softened, about 10 minutes.
6. Place meat on bottom of buns, dividing equally. Divide onion over meat.
7. Top with cheese. Place on baking sheet.
8. Broil sandwich bottoms until cheese melts, about 1 minute. (The sandwich tops, cut side up, may be toasted under the broiler at this time.)
9. Place tops on sandwiches. Serve immediately.
